---
description: 'Guidelines for building C# applications'
applyTo: '**/*.cs'
---
# C# Development
## C# Instructions
*   Always use the latest C# version features.
*	Never use var, always use explicit types.
*   Write clear and concise comments for each function explaining the *why*, not just the *what*.
*   Prefer modern C# features like pattern matching and null-coalescing operators.

## General Instructions
*   Handle edge cases and write clear exception handling.
*   For external dependencies, mention their usage and purpose in comments.
*	For unit tests handle both happy and sad path testing.
